title: cyathea subtropica
intro: Cyathea subtropica, also known as the Southern Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia, particularly in the subtropical regions of New South Wales and Queensland. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathea subtropica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
